title: FATF urges faster crypto AML enforcement as stablecoin crime increases
summary: FATF urges faster crypto AML enforcement as stablecoin crime increases
briefing: The global task force said criminal networks are using stablecoins and developing proprietary tokens to evade asset freezes as countries struggle to enforce crypto AML rules.

title: ARK pushes back against a16z’s ‘TradFi wants blockchain, not DeFi’ claim
summary: ARK pushes back against a16z’s ‘TradFi wants blockchain, not DeFi’ claim
briefing: ARK Invest’s director of research disputed a16z crypto’s thesis that traditional finance will adopt permissioned blockchain infrastructure instead of decentralized finance, saying institutions will increasingly rely on DeFi rails.

title: Autonomous AI agent economy faces infrastructure gaps: Visa, Artemis
summary: Autonomous AI agent economy faces infrastructure gaps: Visa, Artemis
briefing: Visa and Artemis found that infrastructure bottlenecks are preventing broader commercial adoption of the autonomous AI agent economy.

title: US Senate unanimously adopts resolution opposing clemency for SBF
summary: US Senate unanimously adopts resolution opposing clemency for SBF
briefing: The Senate approved a resolution opposing clemency for former FTX CEO Sam Bankman-Fried as prediction markets put the odds of a Trump pardon by July 31 below 1%.

title: Tether invests $20M into Argentine neobank Ualá
summary: Tether invests $20M into Argentine neobank Ualá
briefing: Tether reportedly invested $20 million into Ualá, as part of the Argentine neobank’s $197 million funding round announced earlier in March.

title: Bitcoin $107K buyers providing ‘early signals’ of 2026 bear-market bottom: Glassnode
summary: Bitcoin $107K buyers providing ‘early signals’ of 2026 bear-market bottom: Glassnode
briefing: Bitcoin realized losses appeared to be copying a reversal structure that marked previous bear-market bottoms, with $69,000 a new BTC price battleground.

title: Robinhood Chain memecoin launchpad Vlad.fun halts after ‘internal integrity’ issue
summary: Robinhood Chain memecoin launchpad Vlad.fun halts after ‘internal integrity’ issue
briefing: Vlad.fun suspended its platform after discovering a “serious internal integrity issue” involving members of its team, without disclosing the nature of the alleged misconduct.

title: Hyperion DeFi to deploy 500K HYPE for Hyperliquid HIP-3 markets
summary: Hyperion DeFi to deploy 500K HYPE for Hyperliquid HIP-3 markets
briefing: The deal gives Hyperion an equity stake in Skew and a share of listing-service revenue as it expands the utility of its HYPE treasury assets.

title: Morning Minute: Base Hands Its App Over to Cobie
summary: Morning Minute: Base Hands Its App Over to Cobie
briefing: Plus, Stripe makes a $53 billion move that could crown a stablecoin king. And Ostium gets drained of $18M in the latest DeFi exploit.

title: Feds Arrest Florida Man Over Video Game Malware That Stole $220K in Crypto
summary: Feds Arrest Florida Man Over Video Game Malware That Stole $220K in Crypto
briefing: Zyaire Wilkins allegedly procured malware hidden in video games that infected 8,000 devices and broke into 80 crypto wallets, the FBI says.

title: US Senate Unanimously Opposes Sam Bankman-Fried Pardon
summary: US Senate Unanimously Opposes Sam Bankman-Fried Pardon
briefing: The nonbinding resolution said the disgraced FTX founder should 'under no circumstances' receive clemency.

title: Why Analysts Aren’t Worried About Coinbase’s 30% Drop
summary: Why Analysts Aren’t Worried About Coinbase’s 30% Drop
briefing: William Blair slashed earnings estimates by 34% and held its Outperform call. But analysts think Bitcoin's chart may already be answering the bigger question.

title: OpenAI Uses AI Red Team to Strengthen GPT-5.6 Against Prompt Injection Attacks
summary: OpenAI Uses AI Red Team to Strengthen GPT-5.6 Against Prompt Injection Attacks
briefing: OpenAI said its new automated red-teaming model, GPT-Red, uncovered vulnerabilities that were used to make GPT-5.6 more resistant to prompt injection attacks.

title: Meet Bonsai: The First 27B AI Model That Fits on Your Phone
summary: Meet Bonsai: The First 27B AI Model That Fits on Your Phone
briefing: PrismML's Bonsai 27B runs full reasoning AI on an iPhone for free. We tested it, and it's as impressive as it sounds.

title: What Is BIP-110 and Why Is It Dividing the Bitcoin Community?
summary: What Is BIP-110 and Why Is It Dividing the Bitcoin Community?
briefing: A proposal to restrict non-financial data on Bitcoin has split prominent developers, miners, and industry leaders ahead of a key activation deadline, reopening one of the network's biggest governance debates since the Blocksize Wars.

title: Base Creator Jesse Pollak Steps Back From App Leadership After Admitting Social Bet 'Was Wrong'
summary: Base Creator Jesse Pollak Steps Back From App Leadership After Admitting Social Bet 'Was Wrong'
briefing: Pollak said he is handing the Base App back to Coinbase to focus on building Base into "the blockchain for global finance" after conceding the network's push into on-chain social missed the mark.
